title: arenaria tenuior
intro: Arenaria tenuior, also known as Lesser Sandwort, is a low-growing, spreading alpine plant belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Arenaria tenuior can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
